description: This source file defines a utility object 'SplitUtils' with functions to split a string into a linked list of tokens based on spaces, including internal helpers for token validation and list addition.

classes.name: SplitUtils
classes.description: A Kotlin object providing utility functions to split strings into linked lists by spaces.

methods.name: split
methods.description: Splits the input string into tokens based on spaces and returns a linked list of tokens.

methods.name: addIfValid
methods.description: Adds a token to the list if the token is considered valid.

methods.name: isTokenValid
methods.description: Checks whether a token is valid (non-empty).
